prestazioni: AMG M158 6.0L V12 biturbo (engine code: M158 E60 AL) upgraded with a bespoke Novitec Torado engine management remap, targeting 900+ hp at 6,200 RPM and 950 Nm of torque at 4,000 RPM, utilizing a custom Novitec-developed titanium valve springs and reinforced connecting rods for sustained high-RPM reliability

Dual Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbochargers with billet compressor wheels, custom Pagani-specific wastegates, and a Novitec-designed titanium exhaust manifold with 3.5-inch Inconel downpipes, paired with a Novitec Race full titanium exhaust system featuring quad 100mm outlets and electronically controlled butterfly valves for backpressure optimization

Ohlins TTX46 MkII coilovers with Pagani-specific valving, 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and high-speed compression), and a bespoke carbon-fiber spring perch system, paired with a Pagani-approved H&R monoblock front and rear sway bars (28mm front, 25mm rear) for enhanced mid-corner adjustability
estetica: Novitec Torado carbon-fiber widebody kit with aggressive front fender flares (30mm wider than OEM), custom rear quarter panels, and a bespoke rear diffuser with integrated titanium exhaust outlets, all finished in a matte Pearl White with exposed carbon-fiber weave

Pagani-approved Novitec Torado front splitter with active aerodynamic elements (adjustable via Huayra's active aero system), paired with a custom Novitec rear wing (carbon-fiber, 3D-printed airfoil) featuring a dual-plane design for optimized downforce at high speeds (up to 1,200 kg at 300 km/h)

BBS FI-R 20-inch front and 21-inch rear forged wheels (9.5J front, 12.5J rear) with a custom Pagani Pearl White finish, wrapped in Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires (265/30 R20 front, 355/25 R21 rear), paired with Pagani-approved AP Racing CCM-R carbon-ceramic brakes (410mm front, 390mm rear) with gold-colored calipers
